requirements.description: Dispatcher discovers available actions, describes them, and validates arguments.
Dispatcher dry-run mode prints descriptions and warns on unknown arguments without executing actions.

Actions resolve RelativePath arguments using the action's WorkingDirectory as the base path and pass them without warnings, including when RelativePath is '.' and the WorkingDirectory targets subdirectories.
Every action script exists at the expected path.
Dispatcher fails when RelativePath is missing or invalid after resolving it relative to the specified WorkingDirectory.

Workflow tests the composite action defined in apply-vipc/action.yml with minimum_supported_lv_version '2021', vip_lv_version '2021', supported_bitness '64', relative_path '.', and vipc_path 'scripts/apply-vipc/runner_dependencies.vipc' on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest with dry_run true.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in add-token-to-labview/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in build/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in build-lvlibp/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in build-vi-package/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow clones an external repository and operates on it without modification using the composite action defined in close-labview/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in generate-release-notes/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in missing-in-project/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in modify-vipb-display-info/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in prepare-labview-source/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in rename-file/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in restore-setup-lv-source/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in revert-development-mode/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in run-unit-tests/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in set-development-mode/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in setup-mkdocs/action.yml on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner labeled ubuntu-latest.
Parser ingests JUnit XML artifacts starting at the testsuites root and iterating through nested suites and testcases.
Top-level testsuites attributes name, tests, errors, failures, disabled, and time are captured for summary reporting.
Each testsuite records attributes including name, tests, errors, failures, hostname, id, skipped, disabled, package, and time.
Suite properties are extracted as name/value pairs for environment details.
Testcase attributes name, status, classname, assertions, time, and any skip message are preserved.
Requirement identifiers embedded in testcase names are detected and associated with the test.
Test results are aggregated by requirement and by suite to count passed, failed, and skipped cases.
Traceability matrix links requirement IDs to testcases with status, execution time, host properties, and skipped reasons.
Parsing logic validates presence of required fields and reports missing or malformed data.
Parser tolerates and retains unknown attributes for future extensibility.
Tests ending with SelfHosted.Workflow.Tests.ps1 execute only in dry run mode unless the workflow targets a self-hosted Windows runner labeled self-hosted-windows-lv.
